name: Pega RPA
description: Pega RPA — robotic process automation embedded in Pegas low-code BPM suite. Combines attended and unattended bots with case management.

seo.title: Pega RPA — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Pega RPA: Pega RPA — robotic process automation embedded in Pegas low-code BPM suite. Combines attended and unattended bots with case management.

when_to_use: RPA embedded in Pega BPM for end-to-end process automation
Attended and unattended bots in regulated financial workflows
AI-guided desktop automation for complex case handling
Combining low-code process design with RPA execution in Pega
Automating KYC and compliance checks in banking processes

pros: RPA integrated with Pega's BPM case management
Attended and unattended bots in one platform
Strong fit for existing Pega customers
cons: Only compelling if already on Pega
Developer ergonomics dated vs modern RPA
Not a best-of-breed standalone RPA choice
review.verdict: Makes sense as an add-on for Pega shops; outside that context, stronger RPA options exist.
review.best_for: Large Pega customers extending BPM with embedded RPA
review.not_for: Teams evaluating standalone RPA without existing Pega investment

lock_in.reason: Pega BPM suite, deep platform lock
